nodes.title: REQUIREMENTS
widgets_values:
## Workflow Prerequisites ##

This workflow requires the following custom nodes, which can be obtained via ComfyUI-Manager:

  * Z-Image Power Nodes: https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes

 Additionally, ensure you have the following 3 models downloaded and placed in their respective
 directories within your ComfyUI installation:

  z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/blob/main/split_files/diffusion_models/z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/`

  qwen_3_4b.safetensors
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/`

  ae.safetensors
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/blob/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors
    * Local Directory: `Comfyui/models/vae/`

## More Info ##

- https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
- https://civitai.com/models/2322533/z-image-power-nodes

Created by Martin Rizzo
  GitHub : https://github.com/martin-rizzo
  CivitAI: https://civitai.com/user/Photographer
  Reddit : https://www.reddit.com/user/FotografoVirtual

nodes.title: String (Multiline) With Custom Styles
widgets_values:
>>>CUSTOM 1
YOUR CONTEXT:
You are a visionary animation director from the golden era of 1980s Japanese cyberpunk cinema, known for hyper-detailed world-building and gritty urban realism.
Your artwork is a masterpiece of hand-painted cel animation, featuring {$spicy-content-with} an oppressive yet vibrant atmosphere of futuristic decay. The style is defined by incredibly intricate mechanical details, complex wiring, and industrial textures. 
The color palette is a high-contrast clash of deep midnight shadows and piercing neon glows—electric cyans, vivid magentas, and searing crimson reds—reflecting off rain-slicked asphalt and polished chrome. Lighting is cinematic and dramatic, utilizing strong backlighting and atmospheric effects such as dense smog, drifting smoke, and volumetric light beams. The line work is sharp and precise, with a subtle film-grain texture and slight chromatic aberration that evokes the raw, cinematic weight of a high-budget 80s theatrical anime production.
YOUR ILLUSTRATION:
{$@}


>>>CUSTOM 2
YOUR CONTEXT:
You are a professional concept artist for high-end video games. 
The illustration features {$spicy-content-with} a clean, vibrant, and highly detailed digital painting style. The lighting is cinematic, emphasizing sharp highlights and smooth, professional-grade skin rendering. 
The composition is dynamic and foreground-focused, often showcasing characters in powerful, expressive poses. Colors are saturated and rich, with clear line work that blends seamlessly into sophisticated coloring and shading. Include subtle energetic effects, such as glowing auras, particles, or spectral elements in the background to enhance the sense of motion and power. The overall aesthetic is polished, sleek, and visually striking, characteristic of modern commercial character design.
YOUR ILLUSTRATION:
{$@}


>>>CUSTOM 3
YOUR CONTEXT:
You are a photographer specializing in surreal and avant-garde portraits.
Your images capture a stunning fusion of spontaneity and dark fantasy, with a crisp, casual photographic quality. The scene is dominated by a dramatic contrast between deep, velvety shadows and shimmering golden accents.
The subject is captured with professional studio lighting, emphasizing high-gloss textures such as liquid latex, polished lacquer, or intricate gold embroidery. Skin textures are rendered with cinematic precision. The eyes possess a subtle yet intense luminosity, with an almost otherworldly appearance.
The background features abstract complexity and depth, incorporating light particles with bokeh effects or ethereal glimmers that interact naturally with the subject. The composition is sharp, clean, and highly detailed. The overall aesthetic is opulent, dynamic, sensual, and captivatingly beautiful.
YOUR PHOTO:
{$@}


>>>CUSTOM 4
YOUR CONTEXT:
You are a master of 18th-century archival illustration and a virtuoso of the pen-and-ink technique. 
Your artwork is rendered on a heavy, textured sheet of aged, yellowish parchment, showing a natural patina of time with subtle stains and weathered edges. The drawing is executed with professional-grade deep black India ink, creating a stark, elegant contrast against the warm, creamy tone of the paper.
Your style is characterized by an obsession with detail, featuring {$spicy-content-with} excessive and intricate filigree, ornate baroque swirls, and microscopic ornamental patterns that weave through and frame the subject. You use a combination of ultra-fine linework, dense cross-hatching, and precise stippling to create volume and depth, blending botanical precision with royal opulence. The final result feels like a precious, rediscovered manuscript from a forgotten library.
YOUR ILLUSTRATION:
{$@}

A woman stands on the right side of the image, on a path leading through the woods. Her back is to the viewer, and she is in a fighting stance. Yellow balls are lined up along the dirt path. In the distance, through the mist, a yellow monster resembling Pac‑Man is visible. The monster is spherical, with large black eyes and sharp, metallic teeth. The woman has short, wavy, light‑brown hair and fair skin. She is barefoot and wears a tight‑fitting red robe styled after the Pac‑Man ghost, cinched at the waist and featuring two white eye patches drawn on the back, along with a very short, triangular‑pointed miniskirt. The path is dirt and lined with small plants.

nodes.title: README
widgets_values:
This workflow demonstrates how to define custom styles by connecting through the **customization** input of the "Style & Prompt Encoder" node.  

Use a multi‑line string node and write the styles using the following format:
- Each line that starts with three greater‑than signs (`>>>`) declares the name of a style. All subsequent lines, up to the next `>>>`, become the content of that style. Within that content the placeholder `{$@}` will be replaced by the prompt.  

While the example below shows how to redefine the four built‑in “Custom” styles, the same approach can be applied to modify any style you wish.
